name: Loading State Toast
author: Kevin
description: Exploring a more human loading state that feels less overwhelming.

versions.label: cycling messages with progress bar and spinner

name: Home Electrification Embed
author: Kevin
description: Exploring how multiple home electrification products interact together on a single surface—showing energy changes and bill saving values for fuel switching

versions.label: Multi-product home electrification surface with energy and bill savings

name: Battery Placement
author: Kevin
description: Battery placement interactivity on the CAD canvas and storage inspector to indicate if the battery is intended to be installed inside the home or outside the home.

versions.label: Draggable battery with inside/outside snap and panel toggle

name: Comparisons
author: Kevin
description: Exploring how designs can be compared with a dynamic table builder

versions.label: Dynamic table builder for comparing designs
Storage variables added to variable selector

name: Adders & Discounts
author: Kevin
description: Exploring adders and discounts that apply to products, stand alone, and net adjustments

name: Text Variables
author: Kevin
description: Exploring a model where text variables are scoped to just two states: pre-design and post-design. If a user needs to isolate a specific scenario (e.g. energy efficiency measures only), they'd create a separate design and drop in that design's post-design variable.

versions.label: Pre-design/post-design with variable parameters and conditional descriptions
